text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a while after the Twinkle Series has
calmed down...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm on my way to a hot spring with
Matikanetannhauser, just like we promised.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hot spring! Hot spring! ♪ See how it steams! See
how it steams! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, want a snack, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I have hard candy, chocolate, gum... I bought
everything I could for under 300 yen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Because you're not supposed to spend more than
300 yen on snacks for a trip!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I spent the last ten yen on these little pieces of
gum! These are the fruits of my labor!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, go ahead and take whichever you like
best! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, and not only that! I brought some cards too! We've got to play a game later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the train rolls on toward the hot spring, I think
back on all the other train rides we've been on.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh! This is, like, five times nicer than the
place we went for my class trip!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We arrive at the inn safe and sound.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... I'm pretty sure they said dinner is
served at six, so it looks like we have some free
time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Should we buy some souvenirs or do some
sightseeing? Or maybe... Muuun.
choice_data_list:
Since we're already here, why don't we check
out the hot spring?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! And there's no set times for this hot
spring, either!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's go! Hello hot spring, my old friend!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was just what the doctor ordered.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Haaah...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... Yeah, actually. I guess the hot spring
really hit the spot.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I'm totally fine! We came all the way out here
and there's so many places we have to check out!
choice_data_list: It's okay to take a nap.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? Really? A nap, you say...
choice_data_list: The real reason we came here was to relax.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I guess that's true. When I think of vacations, I
always imagine people wandering around the
whole time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I guess it's fine since it's just the two of us. We
can do anything we want this trip...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Matikanetannhauser really was tired
because she doesn't wake up until sunset.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Aghhh! I slept way too long!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All of the sightseeing spots are closed already! I
really messed up this time.
choice_data_list:
On the contrary, I think it's great you got to
relax.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But I really wanted to make some memories with
you during this trip.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hold on! Isn't there a beach nearby?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Why don't we go check it out since we're here?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wow... It's so beautiful! You can see everything so
clearly even though it's night.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
And the breeze feels good too. It's a good thing
we decided to come here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Ehehe. This hot spring getaway is so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, when I was packing last night, I felt just
like I did before I went on a class trip at my old
school.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I bought snacks, packed cards, and thought of all
the sightseeing spots we'd go to.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I was so excited that I barely slept. Haha...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But going on a trip with just the two of us is a bit
different than going with classmates.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Sure, we still relax and have fun all the same,
but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It feels a bit special, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Things like napping at the hotel or going to the
beach at night are like a special secret, just
between us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe, forget I said that. I don't even know what I'm saying.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser smiles quietly to herself and
watches the waves come and go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Let's go on another trip together sometime.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Yay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Matikanetannhauser and I have
formed an irreplaceable bond dur—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh no! It's past dinner time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite everything, we've formed an
irreplaceable bond during our time together.
